# AIM Foundation (Associated Initiative for Mankind)
> Empowering communities through Education, Healthcare, Sustainability, and Gender Equality.

## Core Mission
Building dignity and inspiring change since 2016. We uplift marginalized families through grassroots initiatives across West Bengal and beyond.

## Key Initiatives
- [Education](https://aimindia.org.in/educational-initiatives): Digital literacy, Spoken English, and AI-powered learning.
- [Healthcare](https://aimindia.org.in/healthcare-initiatives): Mobile health camps, eye care, and cancer detection.
- [Sustainability](https://aimindia.org.in/sustainability-initiatives): Mangrove restoration and reforestation.
- [Empowerment](https://aimindia.org.in/gender-equality-initiative): Women's skill development and livelihoods.

## Get Involved
- [Donate](https://aimindia.org.in/individual-donation)
- [Volunteer](https://aimindia.org.in/volunteering)
- [CSR Partnerships](https://aimindia.org.in/corporate-social-responsibility)
